name: scientific-computing-skills
description: Codex skills for scientific-computing software engineering, numerical validation, performance work, and reproducible workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering guidance for scientific and HPC codebases.
interface.longDescription: A focused Codex skill bundle for scientific software work: build systems, CI, CLI design, numerical testing, profiling, benchmarking, reproducibility, package management, data formats, documentation, and parallel debugging.
defaultPrompt: Review this scientific code for numerical risks.
Add reproducible tests for this solver.
Profile this benchmark and explain the bottleneck.
